column2: Independent Assessment Process - Remote Pilot Competency Failure
column3: ['Verify the operator has implemented an independent assessment process for remote pilots. ', 'Simulate remote pilots failing to meet all competency requirements during assessments. ', 'Determine if the operator can confirm that their remote pilots are competent and qualified based on assessment results. ']
column4: ['The operator confirms they have established a system to assess remote pilot competence and currency. ', 'Remote pilots are unable to pass the required assessments due to deficiencies in their skills or knowledge. ', 'The operator cannot verify that their remote pilots meet all competency requirements, as they have failed during assessments. ']
